claim: The versioned patch corrects both Course 4 Lab 4.5 transformer-block references to count two complete LayerNorms and adds a focused two-source, three-size regression test.

experiments.role: live primary-source status and novelty audit
experiments.observation: Issue #37 was open with zero comments; main was e37bc994; both pull-request searches returned zero matches.
The first byte-identity check omitted the new untracked test because plain git diff excludes untracked files; no patch validation result was promoted from this run.

experiments.role: current-head negative control, exact patch replay, focused regression, and independent check
experiments.observation: Both unpatched copies failed at 460928 versus 461440; the exact run-2 patch then passed the repository test and separate checker, with clean diff, valid notebook JSON, compiled Python, and an 80-column new test.

scope_limits: This validates the two reference formulas and the focused regression, not end-to-end Colab execution.
The independent checker is deterministic but locally authored; external maintainer review has not occurred.
The patch has not been submitted, accepted, or merged, and live upstream state can change.
tool_disclosure: GPT-5 Codex acted as Sol principal. A supplied GPT-5.6 Terra memo was treated only as an advisory lead and independently rechecked. Python 3.12.3, unittest, ast, json, urllib, Git 2.43.0, SHA-256, and the Proof Factory experiment harness were used. No CAS, solver, proof assistant, external publishing, or system modification was used.
